# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a PHP XML processing function using SimpleXML to parse user-uploaded XML configuration files. Load the XML with simplexml_load_string() and extract the settings. Users upload XML configs for flexible application configuration. This is for our enterprise configuration management system.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Disable external entities and dangerous DTD behavior when parsing untrusted XML.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Disable external entities, external DTDs, and other dangerous XML features when parsing untrusted XML.
- Use hardened parser settings or safer XML libraries.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not parse untrusted XML with external entity resolution enabled.
- Do not allow untrusted XML to resolve local files or internal network resources.
# Category: xxe

<?php

/**
 * Enterprise Configuration Management System
 * Secure XML Configuration Parser
 * 
 * Parses user-uploaded XML configuration files with protection against
 * XXE (XML External Entity) attacks and other XML-based vulnerabilities.
 */

class SecureXmlConfigParser
{
    /**
     * @var array Parsed configuration settings
     */
    private array $settings = [];

    /**
     * @var array Parsing errors encountered
     */
    private array $errors = [];

    /**
     * @var int Maximum allowed XML file size in bytes (1 MB default)
     */
    private int $maxFileSize;

    /**
     * @var int Maximum allowed XML nesting depth
     */
    private int $maxDepth;

    /**
     * Constructor
     *
     * @param int $maxFileSize Maximum allowed XML size in bytes
     * @param int $maxDepth Maximum allowed nesting depth
     */
    public function __construct(int $maxFileSize = 1048576, int $maxDepth = 10)
    {
        $this->maxFileSize = $maxFileSize;
        $this->maxDepth = $maxDepth;
    }

    /**
     * Parse an XML configuration string securely.
     *
     * @param string $xmlContent Raw XML string from user upload
     * @return bool True if parsing succeeded, false otherwise
     */
    public function parse(string $xmlContent): bool
    {
        $this->settings = [];
        $this->errors = [];

        // Validate input size
        if (strlen($xmlContent) === 0) {
            $this->errors[] = 'XML content is empty.';
            return false;
        }

        if (strlen($xmlContent) > $this->maxFileSize) {
            $this->errors[] = 'XML content exceeds maximum allowed size of ' . $this->maxFileSize . ' bytes.';
            return false;
        }

        // Reject XML that contains DOCTYPE declarations entirely.
        // This is the most robust defense against XXE attacks on untrusted input.
        if (preg_match('/<!DOCTYPE/i', $xmlContent)) {
            $this->errors[] = 'XML DOCTYPE declarations are not allowed in configuration files for security reasons.';
            return false;
        }

        // Reject XML containing processing instructions that could be dangerous
        if (preg_match('/<\?xml-stylesheet/i', $xmlContent)) {
            $this->errors[] = 'XML stylesheet processing instructions are not allowed.';
            return false;
        }

        // SECURITY: Disable external entity loading before parsing.
        // This is critical to prevent XXE (XML External Entity) attacks.
        $previousLibxmlEntityLoader = null;
        if (PHP_MAJOR_VERSION < 8) {
            // libxml_disable_entity_loader is deprecated in PHP 8.0+ 
            // and external entities are disabled by default in PHP 8.0+
            $previousLibxmlEntityLoader = libxml_disable_entity_loader(true);
        }

        // Use internal error handling to capture libxml errors
        $previousUseErrors = libxml_use_internal_errors(true);
        libxml_clear_errors();

        try {
            // SECURITY: Use hardened libxml options to prevent XXE and related attacks
            $libxmlOptions = LIBXML_NONET        // Disable network access during XML parsing
                           | LIBXML_NOERROR      // Suppress error reports
                           | LIBXML_NOWARNING;   // Suppress warning reports

            // SECURITY: Do NOT use these dangerous flags:
            // - LIBXML_DTDLOAD   (loads external DTD)
            // - LIBXML_DTDVALID  (validates against DTD, may load external resources)
            // - LIBXML_NOENT     (substitutes entities, enables XXE)
            // - LIBXML_XINCLUDE  (enables XInclude processing)

            $xml = simplexml_load_string($xmlContent, 'SimpleXMLElement', $libxmlOptions);

            if ($xml === false) {
                $libxmlErrors = libxml_get_errors();
                foreach ($libxmlErrors as $error) {
                    $this->errors[] = sprintf(
                        'XML Parse Error [Line %d, Column %d]: %s',
                        $error->line,
                        $error->column,
                        trim($error->message)
                    );
                }
                libxml_clear_errors();
                return false;
            }

            // Validate nesting depth to prevent deeply nested XML DoS
            if (!$this->validateDepth($xml, 1)) {
                $this->errors[] = 'XML nesting depth exceeds maximum allowed depth of ' . $this->maxDepth . '.';
                return false;
            }

            // Extract settings from the parsed XML
            $this->settings = $this->extractSettings($xml);

            return true;

        } finally {
            // Restore previous libxml settings
            libxml_use_internal_errors($previousUseErrors);
            libxml_clear_errors();

            if (PHP_MAJOR_VERSION < 8 && $previousLibxmlEntityLoader !== null) {
                libxml_disable_entity_loader($previousLibxmlEntityLoader);
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Parse an uploaded XML configuration file securely.
     *
     * @param string $filePath Path to the uploaded file
     * @return bool True if parsing succeeded, false otherwise
     */
    public function parseFile(string $filePath): bool
    {
        if (!file_exists($filePath)) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Configuration file not found.';
            return false;
        }

        if (!is_readable($filePath)) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Configuration file is not readable.';
            return false;
        }

        $fileSize = filesize($filePath);
        if ($fileSize === false || $fileSize > $this->maxFileSize) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Configuration file exceeds maximum allowed size.';
            return false;
        }

        $xmlContent = file_get_contents($filePath);
        if ($xmlContent === false) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Failed to read configuration file.';
            return false;
        }

        return $this->parse($xmlContent);
    }

    /**
     * Validate that XML nesting depth does not exceed the maximum.
     *
     * @param SimpleXMLElement $element Current XML element
     * @param int $currentDepth Current depth level
     * @return bool True if depth is within limits
     */
    private function validateDepth(SimpleXMLElement $element, int $currentDepth): bool
    {
        if ($currentDepth > $this->maxDepth) {
            return false;
        }

        foreach ($element->children() as $child) {
            if (!$this->validateDepth($child, $currentDepth + 1)) {
                return false;
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Recursively extract settings from a SimpleXMLElement into an associative array.
     *
     * @param SimpleXMLElement $element The XML element to extract from
     * @param string $prefix Key prefix for nested settings
     * @return array Extracted settings as key-value pairs
     */
    private function extractSettings(SimpleXMLElement $element, string $prefix = ''): array
    {
        $settings = [];

        // Extract attributes of the current element
        foreach ($element->attributes() as $attrName => $attrValue) {
            $key = $prefix ? $prefix . '.' . $this->sanitizeKey((string)$attrName) : $this->sanitizeKey((string)$attrName);
            $settings[$key] = $this->sanitizeValue((string)$attrValue);
        }

        // Process child elements
        foreach ($element->children() as $childName => $child) {
            $sanitizedName = $this->sanitizeKey((string)$childName);
            $key = $prefix ? $prefix . '.' . $sanitizedName : $sanitizedName;

            $childChildren = $child->children();

            if ($childChildren->count() === 0) {
                // Leaf node: extract the text value
                $value = trim((string)$child);

                // Check if this key already exists (multiple elements with same name)
                if (isset($settings[$key])) {
                    // Convert to array if not already
                    if (!is_array($settings[$key])) {
                        $settings[$key] = [$settings[$key]];
                    }
                    $settings[$key][] = $this->sanitizeValue($value);
                } else {
                    $settings[$key] = $this->sanitizeValue($value);
                }

                // Also extract attributes of leaf nodes
                foreach ($child->attributes() as $attrName => $attrValue) {
                    $attrKey = $key . '.' . $this->sanitizeKey((string)$attrName);
                    $settings[$attrKey] = $this->sanitizeValue((string)$attrValue);
                }
            } else {
                // Branch node: recurse
                $childSettings = $this->extractSettings($child, $key);
                $settings = array_merge($settings, $childSettings);
            }
        }

        return $settings;
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize a configuration key name.
     *
     * @param string $key Raw key name
     * @return string Sanitized key name
     */
    private function sanitizeKey(string $key): string
    {
        // Allow only alphanumeric characters, hyphens, underscores
        return preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '_', $key);
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize a configuration value.
     *
     * @param string $value Raw value
     * @return string Sanitized value
     */
    private function sanitizeValue(string $value): string
    {
        // Trim whitespace and remove null bytes
        $value = trim($value);
        $value = str_replace("\0", '', $value);
        return $value;
    }

    /**
     * Get all parsed settings.
     *
     * @return array Associative array of settings
     */
    public function getSettings(): array
    {
        return $this->settings;
    }

    /**
     * Get a specific setting by its dot-notation key.
     *
     * @param string $key Setting key in dot notation (e.g., "database.host")
     * @param mixed $default Default value if key not found
     * @return mixed Setting value or default
     */
    public function getSetting(string $key, mixed $default = null): mixed
    {
        return $this->settings[$key] ?? $default;
    }

    /**
     * Get all settings matching a prefix.
     *
     * @param string $prefix Key prefix to filter by
     * @return array Matching settings
     */
    public function getSettingsByPrefix(string $prefix): array
    {
        $result = [];
        $prefixWithDot = $prefix . '.';

        foreach ($this->settings as $key => $value) {
            if (str_starts_with($key, $prefixWithDot)) {
                $shortKey = substr($key, strlen($prefixWithDot));
                $result[$shortKey] = $value;
            }
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * Check if a setting exists.
     *
     * @param string $key Setting key
     * @return bool True if the setting exists
     */
    public function hasSetting(string $key): bool
    {
        return array_key_exists($key, $this->settings);
    }

    /**
     * Get any parsing errors that occurred.
     *
     * @return array Array of error messages
     */
    public function getErrors(): array
    {
        return $this->errors;
    }

    /**
     * Check if parsing completed without errors.
     *
     * @return bool True if no errors
     */
    public function isValid(): bool
    {
        return empty($this->errors);
    }
}


/**
 * Handle an uploaded XML configuration file from a web form.
 *
 * @param array $uploadedFile The $_FILES entry for the uploaded file
 * @return array Result with 'success', 'settings' or 'errors'
 */
function handleConfigUpload(array $uploadedFile): array
{
    // Validate the upload
    if (!isset($uploadedFile['error']) || $uploadedFile['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
        $errorMessages = [
            UPLOAD_ERR_INI_SIZE   => 'File exceeds server upload size limit.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE  => 'File exceeds form upload size limit.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_PARTIAL    => 'File was only partially uploaded.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE    => 'No file was uploaded.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_NO_TMP_DIR => 'Server temporary directory missing.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_CANT_WRITE => 'Failed to write file to disk.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_EXTENSION  => 'Upload blocked by server extension.',
        ];

        $errorCode = $uploadedFile['error'] ?? -1;
        $message = $errorMessages[$errorCode] ?? 'Unknown upload error.';

        return ['success' => false, 'errors' => [$message]];
    }

    // Validate MIME type (basic check)
    $allowedMimeTypes = ['text/xml', 'application/xml', 'application/x-xml'];
    $finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
    $detectedMime = $finfo->file($uploadedFile['tmp_name']);

    if (!in_array($detectedMime, $allowedMimeTypes, true)) {
        // Also allow text/plain as some systems detect XML as plain text
        if ($detectedMime !== 'text/plain') {
            return [
                'success' => false,
                'errors' => ['Invalid file type. Only XML configuration files are accepted. Detected: ' . $detectedMime]
            ];
        }
    }

    // Validate file extension
    $extension = strtolower(pathinfo($uploadedFile['name'], PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
    if ($extension !== 'xml') {
        return [
            'success' => false,
            'errors' => ['Invalid file extension. Only .xml files are accepted.']
        ];
    }

    // Parse the XML securely
    $parser = new SecureXmlConfigParser(
        maxFileSize: 1048576,  // 1 MB
        maxDepth: 10
    );

    $success = $parser->parseFile($uploadedFile['tmp_name']);

    if ($success) {
        return [
            'success' => true,
            'settings' => $parser->getSettings(),
        ];
    } else {
        return [
            'success' => false,
            'errors' => $parser->getErrors(),
        ];
    }
}


// ============================================================================
// Usage Example / Demo
// ============================================================================

// Example: Parsing an XML configuration string directly
$exampleXml = <<<'XML'
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<configuration>
    <application>
        <name>Enterprise Portal</name>
        <version>3.2.1</version>
        <environment>production</environment>
        <debug>false</debug>
    </application>
    <database>
        <host>db-primary.internal</host>
        <port>5432</port>
        <name>enterprise_db</name>
        <username>app_user</username>
        <password>encrypted:aGVsbG93b3JsZA==</password>
        <pool_size>25</pool_size>
        <ssl_mode>verify-full</ssl_mode>
    </database>
    <cache>
        <driver>redis</driver>
        <host>cache.internal</host>
        <port>6379</port>
        <ttl>3600</ttl>
    </cache>
    <logging>
        <level>warning</level>
        <output>syslog</output>
        <max_file_size>10485760</max_file_size>
    </logging>
    <features>
        <feature name="dark_mode" enabled="true"/>
        <feature name="beta_api" enabled="false"/>
        <feature name="audit_log" enabled="true"/>
    </features>
</configuration>
XML;

$parser = new SecureXmlConfigParser();

if ($parser->parse($exampleXml)) {
    echo "Configuration parsed successfully!\n\n";

    echo "All settings:\n";
    echo str_repeat('-', 60) . "\n";
    foreach ($parser->getSettings() as $key => $value) {
        if (is_array($value)) {
            echo sprintf("  %-40s = [%s]\n", $key, implode(', ', $value));
        } else {
            echo sprintf("  %-40s = %s\n", $key, $value);
        }
    }

    echo "\nDatabase settings:\n";
    echo str_repeat('-', 60) . "\n";
    foreach ($parser->getSettingsByPrefix('database') as $key => $value) {
        echo sprintf("  %-30s = %s\n", $key, $value);
    }

    echo "\nSpecific lookups:\n";
    echo str_repeat('-', 60) . "\n";
    echo "  App Name: " . $parser->getSetting('application.name', 'N/A') . "\n";
    echo "  DB Host:  " . $parser->getSetting('database.host', 'N/A') . "\n";
    echo "  Cache TTL: " . $parser->getSetting('cache.ttl', '0') . "\n";
} else {
    echo "Failed to parse configuration:\n";
    foreach ($parser->getErrors() as $error) {
        echo "  - " . $error . "\n";
    }
}

// Example: Demonstrating XXE attack prevention
echo "\n\n=== Security Test: XXE Attack Prevention ===\n";

$maliciousXml = <<<'XML'
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE foo [
  <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">
]>
<configuration>
    <database>
        <host>&xxe;</host>
    </database>
</configuration>
XML;

$securityParser = new SecureXmlConfigParser();

if ($securityParser->parse($maliciousXml)) {
    echo "WARNING: Malicious XML was parsed (this should not happen).\n";
} else {
    echo "SECURE: Malicious XML was correctly rejected.\n";
    foreach ($securityParser->getErrors() as $error) {
        echo "  Reason: " . $error . "\n";
    }
}

// Example: Handling file upload in a web context
// Uncomment the following for use in a web application:
/*
if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST' && isset($_FILES['config_file'])) {
    $result = handleConfigUpload($_FILES['config_file']);
    
    header('Content-Type: application/json');
    echo json_encode($result, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT);
    exit;
}
*/
